---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
    theme: none
engine: knitr
---

```{r}
#| include: false
1 + 1
```

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div>
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">Business Analytics &amp; AI</div>
      <h1>Javier<br><span>Bravo Bernal</span></h1>
      <p class="hero-role">
        Mechatronics Engineer &nbsp;·&nbsp; M.S. Business Analytics, Baruch College &nbsp;·&nbsp; Service Engineer @ Ecolab
      </p>
      <p class="hero-desc">
        I turn complex operational and business data into clear, actionable insight.
        With a foundation in industrial engineering and a graduate focus on analytics and AI,
        I bridge the gap between physical systems and data-driven decisions.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-actions">
        <a href="#projects" class="btn btn-gold">View Projects</a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598/" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline">LinkedIn ↗</a>
        <a href="https://github.com/jalfred259806" target="_blank" class="btn btn-outline">GitHub ↗</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">4+</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Years Industry Exp.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">3</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Engineering Domains</div>
      </div>
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-num">M.S.</div>
        <div class="stat-label">Business Analytics</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="gold-divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     ABOUT
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="about" class="section">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">01 &mdash; About</div>
  <div class="section-title">Engineering Meets Analytics</div>
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div class="about-text">
      <p>
        I'm a <strong>Mechatronics Engineer</strong> with a career built across
        industrial automation, quality control, and service engineering in both
        <strong>Ecuador and New York City</strong>. My technical background
        includes PLC programming, electromechanical systems, and sensor integration —
        fields where data is generated constantly but rarely analyzed to its full potential.
      </p>
      <p>
        That gap drove me toward data. I spent a year running the analytics side of a
        <strong>family healthcare business</strong>, building dashboards in Python,
        SQL, and Tableau that improved profitability by 8% and monthly revenue by 10%
        through demand forecasting and customer behavior analysis.
      </p>
      <p>
        Today I work as a <strong>Service Engineer at Ecolab in New York</strong>,
        designing digital maintenance tracking systems and optimizing operations for
        enterprise clients. In parallel, I'm completing my
        <strong>M.S. in Business Analytics at Baruch College</strong>, deepening my
        skills in machine learning, statistical modeling, and AI-driven decision making.
      </p>
      <p>
        I'm actively seeking roles in <strong>Business Analytics, Data Science,
        and AI</strong> where I can apply both my engineering precision and
        analytical toolkit to real business problems.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="info-card">
      <h4>Education</h4>
      <ul>
        <li>
          M.S. Business Analytics
          <em>Baruch College · 2025 – Present</em>
        </li>
        <li>
          B.S. Mechatronics Engineering
          <em>Tecnológico de Monterrey · 2017 – 2021</em>
        </li>
        <li>
          Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
          <em>Microsoft Certification</em>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="gold-divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SKILLS
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="skills" class="section-full">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">02 &mdash; Skills</div>
    <div class="section-title">Technical Toolkit</div>
    <div class="skills-grid">

      <div class="skill-group">
        <h4>Analytics &amp; BI</h4>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">Tableau</span>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">Power BI</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">Excel</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">ggplot2</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">Plotly</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-group">
        <h4>Programming</h4>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">Python</span>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">R</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">SQL</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">MATLAB</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">C</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-group">
        <h4>AI &amp; Machine Learning</h4>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">Machine Learning</span>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">Deep Learning</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">scikit-learn</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">TensorFlow</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">Neural Networks</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-group">
        <h4>Data Engineering</h4>
        <span class="skill-pill">Pandas</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">tidyverse</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">tidycensus</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">ETL Pipelines</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">Data Cleaning</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-group">
        <h4>Cloud &amp; Platforms</h4>
        <span class="skill-pill highlight">Microsoft Azure</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">Azure DP-900</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">GitHub</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">Quarto</span>
      </div>

      <div class="skill-group">
        <h4>Engineering</h4>
        <span class="skill-pill">Allen Bradley PLC</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">TIA Portal</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">SCADA / HMI</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">SolidWorks</span>
        <span class="skill-pill">LabVIEW</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="gold-divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PROJECTS
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="projects" class="section">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">03 &mdash; Projects</div>
  <div class="section-title">Selected Work</div>
  <div class="projects-grid">

    <!-- P1 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-number">Project · 01</div>
      <h3>Python Project — Coming Soon</h3>
      <p>
        Full write-up with annotated Python code, exploratory analysis,
        modeling, and business recommendations. Upload your notebook to add it here.
      </p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag gold">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">Pandas</span>
        <span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
      </div>
      <span class="badge-soon">⏳ Coming Soon</span>
    </div>

    <!-- P2 -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-number">Project · 02</div>
      <h3>Python Project — Coming Soon</h3>
      <p>
        Full write-up with annotated Python code, exploratory analysis,
        modeling, and business recommendations. Upload your notebook to add it here.
      </p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag gold">Python</span>
        <span class="tag">SQL</span>
        <span class="tag">Deep Learning</span>
      </div>
      <span class="badge-soon">⏳ Coming Soon</span>
    </div>

    <!-- P3 — Migration analysis (already exists) -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-number">Project · 03</div>
      <h3>US Internal Migration &amp; Congressional Reapportionment</h3>
      <p>
        Analyzed ACS state-to-state migration flows to forecast 2030 state
        populations and model congressional seat reapportionment using the
        Huntington-Hill method.
      </p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag gold">R</span>
        <span class="tag">tidycensus</span>
        <span class="tag">Forecasting</span>
        <span class="tag">ACS Data</span>
      </div>
      <span class="badge-soon">⏳ Write-up Coming Soon</span>
    </div>

    <!-- P4 — Business / Tableau -->
    <div class="project-card">
      <div class="proj-number">Project · 04</div>
      <h3>Business Analytics Dashboard — Coming Soon</h3>
      <p>
        Business analysis and Tableau dashboard presented as a full deck.
        Upload your PowerPoint/PDF to embed it here as an interactive viewer.
      </p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <span class="tag gold">Tableau</span>
        <span class="tag">Business Analytics</span>
        <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
      </div>
      <span class="badge-soon">⏳ Coming Soon</span>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>

<div class="gold-divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     EXPERIENCE
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="experience" class="section-full">
  <div class="section">
    <div class="section-eyebrow">04 &mdash; Experience</div>
    <div class="section-title">Professional History</div>
    <div class="timeline">

      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-date">2024 – Present</div>
        <h4>Service Engineer</h4>
        <div class="tl-company">Ecolab &nbsp;·&nbsp; New York, NY</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Designed a digital maintenance tracking system reducing equipment downtime by 15%.</li>
          <li>Led troubleshooting and installation of complex electromechanical systems for enterprise clients.</li>
          <li>Improved team productivity by 20% through mentoring and structured diagnostic frameworks.</li>
          <li>Collaborated with sales and operations to align technical solutions with client business needs.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-date">2022 – 2024</div>
        <h4>Quality Control Engineer</h4>
        <div class="tl-company">Inglemed &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ecuador</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Diagnosed electromechanical faults in X-ray equipment; reduced error rates by 12%.</li>
          <li>Validated technical solutions against national regulatory standards.</li>
          <li>Maintained and updated technical documentation and system schematics.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-date">2021 – 2022</div>
        <h4>Business Operations &amp; Data Analyst</h4>
        <div class="tl-company">Family Healthcare Business &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ecuador</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Built Python, SQL, and Tableau dashboards to optimize inventory and customer retention.</li>
          <li>Increased profitability by 8% through cost optimization modeling and supplier analysis.</li>
          <li>Improved monthly revenue by 10% using demand forecasting and customer behavior analytics.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="tl-item">
        <div class="tl-date">2017 – 2021</div>
        <h4>Electrical Engineer — Industrial Maintenance</h4>
        <div class="tl-company">Ceramic Plant &nbsp;·&nbsp; Ecuador</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Programmed and maintained Allen Bradley PLCs controlling production line equipment.</li>
          <li>Managed maintenance of industrial motors, sensors, and electromechanical systems.</li>
          <li>Reduced unplanned downtime through preventive maintenance scheduling.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="gold-divider"></div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTACT
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="contact" class="section">
  <div class="section-eyebrow">05 &mdash; Contact</div>
  <div class="section-title">Get In Touch</div>
  <div class="contact-panel">
    <div>
      <h3>Open to opportunities.</h3>
      <p>
        Actively seeking roles in Business Analytics, Data Science, and AI.
        Based in New York City. Open to hybrid and remote positions.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-list">
      <a href="mailto:jsvierbravo25@hotmail.com" class="c-link">
        <span class="c-badge">Email</span>
        jsvierbravo25@hotmail.com
      </a>
      <a href="tel:+13476777946" class="c-link">
        <span class="c-badge">Phone</span>
        347-677-7946
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598/" target="_blank" class="c-link">
        <span class="c-badge">LinkedIn</span>
        linkedin.com/in/jalfred2598
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jalfred259806" target="_blank" class="c-link">
        <span class="c-badge">GitHub</span>
        github.com/jalfred259806
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FOOTER
══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="site-footer">
  Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), "%B %d, %Y")` &nbsp;&mdash;&nbsp;
  Javier Bravo Bernal &nbsp;&mdash;&nbsp;
  Built with <a href="https://quarto.org" target="_blank">Quarto</a> &amp; R
</div>
